content.problemStatement:
Define f(X)f(X)f(X) as the largest divisor of XXX other than XXX itself. For example, f(12)=6f(12) = 6f(12)=6 and f(7)=1f(7) = 1f(7)=1.

Note that f(1)f(1)f(1) is defined to be 000.
constraints: The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of a single integer KKK.
For each test case, output on a new line, the **sum** of all NNN which satisfy f(N)=Kf(N) = Kf(N)=K.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 1 : The only number which has f(N)=2f(N) = 2f(N)=2 is 444.
Test Case 2 : The only numbers which have f(N)=3f(N) = 3f(N)=3 are 666 and 999. The sum of them is 151515.
